title: ICAI Declares CA Foundation and Intermediate January 2026 Exam Results!
content:
# ICAI Declares CA Foundation and Intermediate January 2026 Exam Results!

Ek important update hai for all CA Foundation and Intermediate aspirants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne January 2026 session ke exam results declare kar diye hain.

*   **Result Declaration Date:** The CA Foundation and Intermediate January 2026 exam results were officially declared on March 8, 2026.
*   **Where to Check:** Candidates can check their scorecards and qualification status online on the official ICAI result portals.
*   **Details Required:** To access your results, you will need to enter your roll number and registration number on the result portal.

All students are advised to check their results promptly and download their scorecards for future reference.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://icai.nic.in/)

*Published on: 9 March 2026*
